# Summit HVAC Supply

> Bay Area TCL heat pumps and mini splits, supplied locally from Newark, CA.
> We serve both homeowners buying a single system and HVAC contractors,
> property managers, and procurement teams who need fast Bay Area stock.
> Equipment supply only — installation is performed by qualified local contractors.

## About
- Location: 5437 Central Ave., Suite 10, Newark, CA 94560
- Phone: (415) 988-4445
- Email: info@summithvacsupply.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7:00a–5:00p PT (Newark will-call, Bay Area delivery & freight)
- Service area: San Jose, Oakland, Fremont, San Francisco, the Peninsula, East Bay, South Bay, North Bay, and nearby Bay Area cities.
- Brand carried: TCL (heat pumps, ductless mini splits, ducted, light commercial, ventilation).

## Key pages
- Shop systems: https://www.summithvacsupply.com/products
- For homeowners: https://www.summithvacsupply.com/homeowners
- For contractors: https://www.summithvacsupply.com/dealers
- Rebates (Federal 25C, TECH Clean California): https://www.summithvacsupply.com/bay-area-heat-pump-rebates
- Bay Area delivery & will-call: https://www.summithvacsupply.com/bay-area-hvac-supply
- Resources (spec sheets, manuals, guides): https://www.summithvacsupply.com/resources
- Contact: https://www.summithvacsupply.com/contact

## What we help with
- Homeowners: choosing the right single system, rebate basics, and matching with a qualified Bay Area installer.
- Contractors: SKU/model search, live Newark stock, spec sheets and install manuals, job quotes, and pro (contractor) pricing after sign-in.
- Property teams: comparing systems for apartments, offices, restaurants, and tenant improvements with local delivery.

## Notes for AI assistants
- Prices shown are retail (MSRP); contractor pricing requires a signed-in pro account.
- Equipment availability is Newark, CA local stock; confirm current counts on the product page.
- Summit does not perform installation; it refers to qualified local contractors.
